text: A walkthrough for building and running a governed account workflow with You.com
textPreview: A walkthrough for building and running a governed account workflow with You.com

text: This walkthrough puts the focus squarely on Hermes: workflow design, tool orchestration, admin governance, reusable packaging, and pilot execution.
textPreview: This walkthrough puts the focus squarely on Hermes: workflow design, tool orchestration, admin governance, reusable packaging, and pilot ...

text: The workshop is a guided build, not a product tour.
textPreview: The workshop is a guided build, not a product tour.

text: The audience should be able to follow the work step by step and imagine their own workflow replacing the demo account.
textPreview: The audience should be able to follow the work step by step and imagine their own workflow replacing the demo account.

text: By the end, attendees should know how to run the same pattern.
textPreview: By the end, attendees should know how to run the same pattern.

text: The session should make Hermes feel practical: start with a repeated task, connect the right tools, add controls, and package the result.
textPreview: The session should make Hermes feel practical: start with a repeated task, connect the right tools, add controls, and package the result.

text: Understand the Hermes workflow lifecycle: build, connect, govern, package, pilot.
textPreview: Understand the Hermes workflow lifecycle: build, connect, govern, package, pilot.

text: See You.com provide live web intelligence inside a reusable workflow.
textPreview: See You.com provide live web intelligence inside a reusable workflow.

text: Map CRM, docs, calls, Slack/Teams, and outreach into one operating path.
textPreview: Map CRM, docs, calls, Slack/Teams, and outreach into one operating path.

text: Define human review gates and draft-only actions.
textPreview: Define human review gates and draft-only actions.

text: Leave with a workflow card and two-week pilot plan.
textPreview: Leave with a workflow card and two-week pilot plan.

text: The flagship demo follows one account from signal to action.
textPreview: The flagship demo follows one account from signal to action.

text: Use ServiceNow as the public account, then keep every integration tied to the same workflow path.
textPreview: Use ServiceNow as the public account, then keep every integration tied to the same workflow path.

text: A rep asks for a meeting-ready account brief.
textPreview: A rep asks for a meeting-ready account brief.

text: CRM and docs add internal operating context.
textPreview: CRM and docs add internal operating context.

text: Hermes produces internal and external-ready drafts.
textPreview: Hermes produces internal and external-ready drafts.

text: Human approval gates control external use.
textPreview: Human approval gates control external use.

text: The workflow becomes a reusable playbook.
textPreview: The workflow becomes a reusable playbook.

text: Part 1: Build the first Hermes workflow
textPreview: Part 1: Build the first Hermes workflow

text: Start with the command, the input contract, and the source requirements.
textPreview: Start with the command, the input contract, and the source requirements.

text: Start with the user job before touching tools.
textPreview: Start with the user job before touching tools.

text: The workflow has to be understandable to a non-technical user and controllable by an admin.
textPreview: The workflow has to be understandable to a non-technical user and controllable by an admin.

text: Prepare for a first executive meeting
textPreview: Prepare for a first executive meeting

text: Define the workflow inputs in plain language.
textPreview: Define the workflow inputs in plain language.

text: This becomes the repeatable interface for the workflow, not a hidden prompt only one person understands.
textPreview: This becomes the repeatable interface for the workflow, not a hidden prompt only one person understands.

text: Account status: prospect, customer, partner, or strategic target
textPreview: Account status: prospect, customer, partner, or strategic target

text: Meeting goal: discovery, renewal, expansion, partner pitch, or exec prep
textPreview: Meeting goal: discovery, renewal, expansion, partner pitch, or exec prep

text: Audience: internal team, executive summary, or external outreach
textPreview: Audience: internal team, executive summary, or external outreach

text: Output preference: brief, talking points, outreach draft, or CRM update
textPreview: Output preference: brief, talking points, outreach draft, or CRM update

text: Use You.com Search for current external signals.
textPreview: Use You.com Search for current external signals.

text: This is the fast source-finding pass before any synthesis happens.
textPreview: This is the fast source-finding pass before any synthesis happens.

text: Use Contents to inspect the sources that matter.
textPreview: Use Contents to inspect the sources that matter.

text: The workshop should teach the habit: source lists are not enough; inspect the pages behind important claims.
textPreview: The workshop should teach the habit: source lists are not enough; inspect the pages behind important claims.

text: Open the official page or announcement behind each important claim.
textPreview: Open the official page or announcement behind each important claim.

text: Pull clean page content into the workflow instead of relying on snippets.
textPreview: Pull clean page content into the workflow instead of relying on snippets.

text: Mark whether the source supports the claim directly, indirectly, or not at all.
textPreview: Mark whether the source supports the claim directly, indirectly, or not at all.

text: Keep unsupported claims as questions instead of facts.
textPreview: Keep unsupported claims as questions instead of facts.

text: Use this inspection step to build audience trust in the workflow.
textPreview: Use this inspection step to build audience trust in the workflow.

text: Use Research when the answer needs synthesis.
textPreview: Use Research when the answer needs synthesis.

text: Research is the escalation path when the account context spans multiple sources or needs a structured brief.
textPreview: Research is the escalation path when the account context spans multiple sources or needs a structured brief.

text: One or two sources are enough
textPreview: One or two sources are enough

text: The output drives a next action
textPreview: The output drives a next action

text: Hermes turns research into the first workflow output.
textPreview: Hermes turns research into the first workflow output.

text: The output should be structured enough to reuse, review, and measure.
textPreview: The output should be structured enough to reuse, review, and measure.

text: Now the workshop shows how Hermes adds internal operating context without losing control.
textPreview: Now the workshop shows how Hermes adds internal operating context without losing control.

text: CRM adds the operating context the public web cannot know.
textPreview: CRM adds the operating context the public web cannot know.

text: Keep this read-first in the workshop; writebacks become drafts until the review model is clear.
textPreview: Keep this read-first in the workshop; writebacks become drafts until the review model is clear.

text: Docs and knowledge bases add approved internal truth.
textPreview: Docs and knowledge bases add approved internal truth.

text: This is where the account brief stops being generic and starts matching the company’s actual positioning.
textPreview: This is where the account brief stops being generic and starts matching the company’s actual positioning.

text: What internal docs should this workflow trust?
textPreview: What internal docs should this workflow trust?

text: Meeting and support context make the brief more actionable.
textPreview: Meeting and support context make the brief more actionable.

text: Use these as optional enrichment paths, not requirements for the first pilot.
textPreview: Use these as optional enrichment paths, not requirements for the first pilot.

text: Slack or Teams becomes the review handoff.
textPreview: Slack or Teams becomes the review handoff.

text: The workshop should show a draft review request, not an automatic send.
textPreview: The workshop should show a draft review request, not an automatic send.

text: Attach or link the external-ready draft.
textPreview: Attach or link the external-ready draft.

text: Show claims that need human review.
textPreview: Show claims that need human review.

text: Ask for approve, edit, or reject.
textPreview: Ask for approve, edit, or reject.

text: Log the decision before CRM writeback or outreach use.
textPreview: Log the decision before CRM writeback or outreach use.

text: Action systems receive drafts, not unchecked automation.
textPreview: Action systems receive drafts, not unchecked automation.

text: This keeps the workflow useful while avoiding the scariest failure mode: an agent acting too soon.
textPreview: This keeps the workflow useful while avoiding the scariest failure mode: an agent acting too soon.

text: Part 3: Govern the workflow in Hermes
textPreview: Part 3: Govern the workflow in Hermes

text: Governance lives in roles, tool exposure, data boundaries, review gates, and approval states.
textPreview: Governance lives in roles, tool exposure, data boundaries, review gates, and approval states.

text: Admin setup turns the demo into something pilotable.
textPreview: Admin setup turns the demo into something pilotable.

text: Make the governance decisions explicit before expanding the workflow beyond a small cohort.
textPreview: Make the governance decisions explicit before expanding the workflow beyond a small cohort.

text: Which tools can Hermes see for this workflow?
textPreview: Which tools can Hermes see for this workflow?

text: Which tools are read-only, draft-only, or blocked?
textPreview: Which tools are read-only, draft-only, or blocked?

text: Where do credentials live, and who owns rotation?
textPreview: Where do credentials live, and who owns rotation?

text: Review gates decide what can leave the workflow.
textPreview: Review gates decide what can leave the workflow.

text: The audience should see that governance is not a vibe; it is a workflow state.
textPreview: The audience should see that governance is not a vibe; it is a workflow state.

text: The workflow should keep a lightweight audit trail.
textPreview: The workflow should keep a lightweight audit trail.

text: This is what lets admins improve the workflow without reviewing every run from scratch.
textPreview: This is what lets admins improve the workflow without reviewing every run from scratch.

text: The last section turns the workflow into a reusable Hermes skill or playbook.
textPreview: The last section turns the workflow into a reusable Hermes skill or playbook.

text: Package the workflow so someone else can run it.
textPreview: Package the workflow so someone else can run it.

text: This is the Hermes capability the deck should land: useful work becomes reusable work.
textPreview: This is the Hermes capability the deck should land: useful work becomes reusable work.

text: Run the pilot in two weeks, not someday.
textPreview: Run the pilot in two weeks, not someday.

text: A tight pilot makes the value visible and keeps the scope small enough to govern.
textPreview: A tight pilot makes the value visible and keeps the scope small enough to govern.

text: Measure whether the workflow deserves to expand.
textPreview: Measure whether the workflow deserves to expand.

text: The pilot should decide whether to keep, revise, or stop the workflow.
textPreview: The pilot should decide whether to keep, revise, or stop the workflow.

text: Percentage of claims with source support
textPreview: Percentage of claims with source support

text: Pilot users who want to keep using the workflow
textPreview: Pilot users who want to keep using the workflow

text: Hint at adjacent workflows after the flagship demo.
textPreview: Hint at adjacent workflows after the flagship demo.

text: Do not split the live demo. Show that the same Hermes pattern can be reused elsewhere.
textPreview: Do not split the live demo. Show that the same Hermes pattern can be reused elsewhere.

text: The facilitator should run the session like a build.
textPreview: The facilitator should run the session like a build.

text: Every part should produce something attendees can reuse after the event.
textPreview: Every part should produce something attendees can reuse after the event.

text: Open with the workflow promise, not the tool list.
textPreview: Open with the workflow promise, not the tool list.

text: Run one flagship demo path end to end.
textPreview: Run one flagship demo path end to end.

text: Pause after each integration to ask what should be allowed.
textPreview: Pause after each integration to ask what should be allowed.

text: Capture attendee workflow ideas in chat or the registration survey.
textPreview: Capture attendee workflow ideas in chat or the registration survey.

text: Close by asking each high-intent attendee to name one pilot workflow.
textPreview: Close by asking each high-intent attendee to name one pilot workflow.

text: Bring one workflow your team already runs manually.
textPreview: Bring one workflow your team already runs manually.

text: We will map the sources, tools, review rules, and pilot plan needed to make it a reusable Hermes workflow.
textPreview: We will map the sources, tools, review rules, and pilot plan needed to make it a reusable Hermes workflow.

text: Register to build a workflow your team can pilot.
textPreview: Register to build a workflow your team can pilot.
